{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Restaurant Manager",
  "description": "Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As a Restaurant Manager, you will oversee all aspects of outlet operations, ensuring smooth day-to-day functioning, high service standards, and staff accountability.
	You will lead a team, manage inventory, maintain the facility, and drive overall operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily outlet operations, ensuring high standards in customer service, product quality, and operational efficiency.
	Lead, train, and motivate staff to achieve performance targets and operational goals.
	Ensure proper staff grooming, professional conduct, and adherence to company policies.
	Monitor inventory usage, prevent wastage, and control stock levels.
	Monitor facility maintenance and cleanliness to meet operational standards.
	Drive a culture of teamwork, accountability, and excellent customer experience.
	Ensure excellent customer service and timely complaint resolution.
	Enforce strict staff grooming and conduct standards.


Core Competencies


	Prior experience in a QSR or food business is required.
	3-5 years of experience in a QSR
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent understanding of QSR operations and food service management.
	Ability to manage customer service, inventory, facilities, staff performance, and product quality.
	Strong communication and problem-solving skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrunclestansfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Restaurant Manager&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the mail.",

Restaurant Manager Job at Uncle Stans Food




        
    

        
        Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Restaurant Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As a Restaurant Manager, you will oversee all aspects of outlet operations, ensuring smooth day-to-day functioning, high service standards, and staff accountability.
	You will lead a team, manage inventory, maintain the facility, and drive overall operational excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily outlet operations, ensuring high standards in customer service, product quality, and operational efficiency.
	Lead, train, and motivate staff to achieve performance targets and operational goals.
	Ensure proper staff grooming, professional conduct, and adherence to company policies.
	Monitor inventory usage, prevent wastage, and control stock levels.
	Monitor facility maintenance and cleanliness to meet operational standards.
	Drive a culture of teamwork, accountability, and excellent customer experience.
	Ensure excellent customer service and timely complaint resolution.
	Enforce strict staff grooming and conduct standards.


Core Competencies


	Prior experience in a QSR or food business is required.
	3-5 years of experience in a QSR
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent understanding of QSR operations and food service management.
	Ability to manage customer service, inventory, facilities, staff performance, and product quality.
	Strong communication and problem-solving skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrunclestansfoods@gmail.com using "Restaurant Manager" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Manager",
  "description": "Uncle Stans Food is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As an Operations Manager, you will oversee operations across all outlets, ensuring smooth daily functioning, high service standards, and operational efficiency.
	You will drive operational excellence, implement best practices, and ensure each outlet delivers a high standard of service and efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily operations across all outlets to maintain operational standards.
	Ensure exceptional customer service and swift resolution of complaints.
	Monitor and maintain facility standards, cleanliness, and operational readiness.
	Enforce staff grooming, discipline, and adherence to company policies.
	Supervise inventory management, prevent wastage, and maintain accurate stock levels.
	Maintain consistent product quality across all outlets.
	Identify operational gaps and implement process improvements to optimize efficiency.
	Coordinate with outlet managers and supervisors to ensure teamwork, accountability, and structured workflow.


Core Competencies


	Prior experience in a QSR or food business is required.
	3&ndash;5 years of multi-outlet operations management experience.
	Strong leadership, decision-making, and team management skills.
	Ability to enforce operational standards and drive accountability across teams.
	Excellent problem-solving, planning, and communication skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrunclestansfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Operating primarily through counter-service and drive-thrus, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As an Operations Manager, you will oversee operations across all outlets, ensuring smooth daily functioning, high service standards, and operational efficiency.
	You will drive operational excellence, implement best practices, and ensure each outlet delivers a high standard of service and efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily operations across all outlets to maintain operational standards.
	Ensure exceptional customer service and swift resolution of complaints.
	Monitor and maintain facility standards, cleanliness, and operational readiness.
	Enforce staff grooming, discipline, and adherence to company policies.
	Supervise inventory management, prevent wastage, and maintain accurate stock levels.
	Maintain consistent product quality across all outlets.
	Identify operational gaps and implement process improvements to optimize efficiency.
	Coordinate with outlet managers and supervisors to ensure teamwork, accountability, and structured workflow.


Core Competencies


	Prior experience in a QSR or food business is required.
	3–5 years of multi-outlet operations management experience.
	Strong leadership, decision-making, and team management skills.
	Ability to enforce operational standards and drive accountability across teams.
	Excellent problem-solving, planning, and communication skills.


Method of Application

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "QA Engineer",
  "description": "Carlcare Development Nigeria limitedis the parent company of TECNO, Infinix, and itel, and a leading smartphone manufacturer in Africa and emerging markets. With a focus on innovation tailored to local needs, CDNL also manages accessory, appliance, and after-sales brands like Oraimo, Syinix, and Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: QA Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Oversee end-to-end product functional testing processes, including test case design, execution, defect tracking (closed-loop in Jira), and report generation.
	Conduct user experience testing and provide product optimization suggestions based on local user habits.
	Perform specialized testing such as competitive product analysis and network latency testing
	Identify localization issues in language usage to ensure terminology aligns with Hausa and Nigerian English contexts.
	Collaborate with Chinese teams to execute overseas testing tasks and drive issue resolution.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or higher in Computer Science or related fields, with 2+ years of testing experience.
	Strong understanding of testing fundamentals, with experience in test case design and competitive analysis.
	Familiarity with Jira and other defect management tools; experience in international team collaboration is a plus.
	Proficiency in ADB tools, Android testing, and app testing
	Deep knowledge of Nigerian user behavior and cultural nuances impacting product experience.
	Experience with AI voice products or international projects is preferred.


Method of Application&nbsp;

QA Engineer Job at Carlcare Development Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Carlcare Development Nigeria limitedis the parent company of TECNO, Infinix, and itel, and a leading smartphone manufacturer in Africa and emerging markets. With a focus on innovation tailored to local needs, CDNL also manages accessory, appliance, and after-sales brands like Oraimo, Syinix, and Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: QA Engineer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee end-to-end product functional testing processes, including test case design, execution, defect tracking (closed-loop in Jira), and report generation.
	Conduct user experience testing and provide product optimization suggestions based on local user habits.
	Perform specialized testing such as competitive product analysis and network latency testing
	Identify localization issues in language usage to ensure terminology aligns with Hausa and Nigerian English contexts.
	Collaborate with Chinese teams to execute overseas testing tasks and drive issue resolution.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science or related fields, with 2+ years of testing experience.
	Strong understanding of testing fundamentals, with experience in test case design and competitive analysis.
	Familiarity with Jira and other defect management tools; experience in international team collaboration is a plus.
	Proficiency in ADB tools, Android testing, and app testing
	Deep knowledge of Nigerian user behavior and cultural nuances impacting product experience.
	Experience with AI voice products or international projects is preferred.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: habeebat.bakare@transsion.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Care Representative",
  "description": "Career Breedge Consultancy Limited - Our client, a reliable real estate development company, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Representative&nbsp;

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a smart, proactive, and sales-driven Customer CareRepresentative to join their team.
	This role is ideal for someone who understands that customer care goes beyond answering questions but involves building relationships, nurturing leads, and converting inquiries into satisfied clients.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for managing customer interactions, supporting the sales process, maintaining strong client relationships, and ensuring an excellent customer experience from first contact to final transaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond promptly and professionally to all customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, social media, and walk-in visits.
	Provide accurate information about available properties, pricing, payment plans, and ongoing promotions.
	Follow up consistently with prospective clients to nurture leads and convert them into buyers.
	Maintain strong relationships with existing clients to encourage referrals and repeat business.
	Resolve customer complaints or concerns effectively while maintaining a positive customer experience.
	Work closely with the sales and marketing team to support property sales campaigns.
	Keep accurate records of all customer interactions, inquiries, and sales activities.
	Maintain a professional and friendly brand image in all communications.
	Assist in coordinating property inspections, client meetings, and documentation processes.
	Ensure clients are properly guided through the purchase process from inquiry to closure.
	Attend to and manage walk-in customers and visitors.


Expected Performance Standards
The ideal candidate must demonstrate:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team environment
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented mindset with a strong drive for results
	Good knowledge of local real estate market trends
	Strong customer relationship management skills
	Ability to convert inquiries into sales opportunities
	Excellent follow-up discipline with prospects and clients
	Strong problem-solving and conflict-resolution ability
	Ability to work under pressure and meet targets.


Qualification &amp; Experience


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or related field.
	Minimum of 1&ndash;2 years of experience in customer service, sales, or client relations (experience in real estate is an advantage).
	Strong interpersonal and persuasive communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and digital communication tools (WhatsApp, email, CRM platforms, etc.).
	Female, for gender balance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified persons should send their applications and CV to&nbsp;admin@endlexgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the&nbsp;subject

Customer Care Representative Job at Career Breedge Consultancy Limited




        
    

        
        Career Breedge Consultancy Limited - Our client, a reliable real estate development company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Representative 

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is seeking a smart, proactive, and sales-driven Customer CareRepresentative to join their team.
	This role is ideal for someone who understands that customer care goes beyond answering questions but involves building relationships, nurturing leads, and converting inquiries into satisfied clients.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for managing customer interactions, supporting the sales process, maintaining strong client relationships, and ensuring an excellent customer experience from first contact to final transaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond promptly and professionally to all customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, social media, and walk-in visits.
	Provide accurate information about available properties, pricing, payment plans, and ongoing promotions.
	Follow up consistently with prospective clients to nurture leads and convert them into buyers.
	Maintain strong relationships with existing clients to encourage referrals and repeat business.
	Resolve customer complaints or concerns effectively while maintaining a positive customer experience.
	Work closely with the sales and marketing team to support property sales campaigns.
	Keep accurate records of all customer interactions, inquiries, and sales activities.
	Maintain a professional and friendly brand image in all communications.
	Assist in coordinating property inspections, client meetings, and documentation processes.
	Ensure clients are properly guided through the purchase process from inquiry to closure.
	Attend to and manage walk-in customers and visitors.


Expected Performance Standards
The ideal candidate must demonstrate:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team environment
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented mindset with a strong drive for results
	Good knowledge of local real estate market trends
	Strong customer relationship management skills
	Ability to convert inquiries into sales opportunities
	Excellent follow-up discipline with prospects and clients
	Strong problem-solving and conflict-resolution ability
	Ability to work under pressure and meet targets.


Qualification & Experience


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in Marketing, Business Administration, Mass Communication, or related field.
	Minimum of 1–2 years of experience in customer service, sales, or client relations (experience in real estate is an advantage).
	Strong interpersonal and persuasive communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and digital communication tools (WhatsApp, email, CRM platforms, etc.).
	Female, for gender balance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified persons should send their applications and CV to admin@endlexgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
